positive: An isometric, minimalist illustration of a forest journey. The scene depicts stylized, geometrically shaped natural elements: a winding path, abstract mountain peaks, oversized ferns, and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. A single, highly stylized woodland creature (like a fox or deer) is walking along the path, portrayed in clean silhouette with subtle gradient highlights. The overall composition is centered, emphasizing the path and the sense of wonder. Style: Art Nouveau meets Modern Minimalist graphic design. Color direction: Deep emerald greens, slate blues, muted creams, accented by vibrant, neon coral and turquoise bioluminescence. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting emanating from the mushrooms, creating defined shadows. Ideal for repeating apparel print, clean lines, vector-art feel.
negative: blurry, low detail, photorealistic, text, logo, signature, watermark, artifact, noise, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, monochrome, messy, clutter, realistic forest photo
